rhythm_pattern.pacing_descriptor: Continuous moderate tension with periodic spikes during high-density traffic encounters

difficulty_curve.early_game: Introductory racing with manageable enemy density and predictable patterns
notable_spikes: Increased enemy vehicle density in advanced stages

notable_level_patterns.description: Player drives horizontally across screen, jumping over or around enemy vehicles while avoiding collisions; stage repeats with increasing difficulty
notable_level_patterns.example_level: Multiple levels follow this core loop structure

data_assessment: Source provides minimal gameplay documentation; primarily contains publishing and regional difference information. Element introduction order, rhythm patterns, and spatial grammar inferred from paradigm (sports-racing) and available context rather than explicit documentation.
